sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63678" key="lixnote/nqhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιχνο-τένθης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63678.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greedy glutton</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
